title: ochrosia compta
intro: Ochrosia compta, also known as the Black Olive or Black Olive Tree, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. Ochrosia compta has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and in some cases, its bark and roots are used in herbal preparations such as capsules or tinctures.
